notes: Public Rasa core form is compile-time expanded by `rasa-expand`; no runtime primitive backing is installed.
Alpha expansion covers the fixed built-in logical macro set only; user-defined macros are deferred.
functions.summary: Public Rasa core form is compile-time expanded by `rasa-expand`; no runtime primitive backing is installed.

functions.name: zero?
notes: Public Rasa core facade delegates to a reserved `rasa.prim` backing primitive.
Alpha numeric semantics cover checked i64 and finite f64; full Clojure numeric tower parity is deferred.
functions.summary: Returns true when x is numeric zero.

functions.name: zipmap
notes: Public Rasa core facade is installed as eval-owned native semantics; core metadata is descriptive evidence only.
Alpha eager pairwise semantics consume seqable inputs until the shorter input ends; the result is not a LazySeq.
functions.summary: Public Rasa core facade is installed as eval-owned native semantics; core metadata is descriptive evidence only.
